title: Image To Image Four Season Eye Macro Vertical
sourceTitle: Image To Image Four Season Eye Macro Vertical Panels AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image 3:4 four-panel hyperrealistic eye macro using uploaded eye close-up before four-season macro transformation, preserving same eye shape from the uploaded close-up guide across Spring, Summer, Autumn, and Winter. Subject: same eye shape from the uploaded close-up guide stays consistent in every panel while the contact lens color, lashes, cheek decorations, butterflies or dragonfly, and surrounding seasonal motifs change through Spring cherry-blossom pink lens, Summer lotus-green lens, Autumn gold-and-red lens, Winter snow-blue lens. Scene: Each vertical panel becomes a dreamy healing seasonal eye world: cherry blossoms for Spring, lotus water for Summer, maple leaves for Autumn, and snowflakes with red plum blossoms for Winter. Composition: Four panels arranged top to bottom in 3:4 format, each with center season text SPRING, SUMMER, AUTUMN, WINTER, calligraphic label below, consistent eyelid shape, soft golden hair accents, and dense macro detail. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image four season eye macro vertical panels source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Hyperrealistic beauty macro photography with fantasy seasonal ornamentation, delicate healing mood, soft eyelashes, realistic skin texture around the eyes, crystalline detail, and polished vertical poster finish. Color Palette: Pastel cherry pink, lotus green, gold and red autumn tones, snow blue and white winter light, faint golden hair, and soft luminous skin tones. Lighting: Soft delicate Spring light, translucent flowing Summer light, warm golden Autumn light, cold blue-white Winter light, and balanced macro catchlights across all panels. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Image To Image Four Season Eye Macro Vertical Panels Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image 3:4 four-panel hyperrealistic eye macro using reference eye macro photo before seasonal contact-lens panel design, preserving specific reference eye variant with readable visual details across Spring, Summer, Autumn, and Winter. Subject: specific reference eye variant with readable visual details stays consistent in every panel while the contact lens color, lashes, cheek decorations, butterflies or dragonfly, and surrounding seasonal motifs change through pink flowers and butterflies, lotus petals and dragonfly, maple leaves and orange butterflies, ice crystals and silver-white butterflies. Scene: Each vertical panel becomes a dreamy healing seasonal eye world: cherry blossoms for Spring, lotus water for Summer, maple leaves for Autumn, and snowflakes with red plum blossoms for Winter. Composition: Four panels arranged top to bottom in 3:4 format, each with center season text Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter, calligraphic label below, consistent eyelid shape, soft golden hair accents, and dense macro detail. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image four season eye macro vertical panels source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Hyperrealistic beauty macro photography with fantasy seasonal ornamentation, delicate healing mood, soft eyelashes, realistic skin texture around the eyes, crystalline detail, and polished vertical poster finish. Color Palette: Pastel cherry pink, lotus green, gold and red autumn tones, snow blue and white winter light, faint golden hair, and soft luminous skin tones. Lighting: Soft delicate Spring light, translucent flowing Summer light, warm golden Autumn light, cold blue-white Winter light, and balanced macro catchlights across all panels. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
